notes: Concord Museum (concordmuseum.org) — admission prices not published on website. Multiple URL patterns attempted (/, /visit, /admission, /visit/, /plan-your-visit, /plan-your-visit/admission, /tickets, /buy-tickets, /hours-admission, /plan-your-visit/buy-tickets, /info, /exhibitions, /plan-your-visit/tickets, /admission-hours) — all returned 404 or no price content. Museum is likely only ticketing through an external system.
